title: calamagrostis holciformis subsp. pamirica
intro: Calamagrostis holciformis subsp. pamirica is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae, commonly found in mountainous regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Calamagrostis holciformis subsp. pamirica include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
